quote_texts: Mr. MacDonald could have interests that would not be aligned with other Mac-Gray stockholders
Moab might have an interest in an equity rollover of all or a portion of Moab's shares of Mac-Gray common stock
third parties who would be interested in partnering with Mr. MacDonald (either through continued employment and/or contribution of some or all of his existing equity, a so-called equity "rollover")
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: possible contribution of some or all of his existing equity in connection with partnering with third parties

quote_texts: Moab might have an interest in an equity rollover of all or a portion of Moab's shares of Mac-Gray common stock
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: possible equity rollover of all or a portion of Moab's shares of Mac-Gray common stock

actor_relation_claims.object_label: Board's evaluation of strategic alternatives and any negotiations with third parties
quote_texts: Following this discussion, the Board decided, and Mr. MacDonald and Mr. Rothenberg agreed, that it would be appropriate to exclude Mr. MacDonald and Mr. Rothenberg from the Board's evaluation of strategic alternatives and any negotiations with third parties that might take place.
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: excluded in view of the possibility that Mr. MacDonald and/or Moab could be asked to partner with a potential acquiror given their respective equity stakes in Mac-Gray
